plugins.name: go-tools
plugins.description: Go development guards — blocks Explore agent in Go projects, enforces gosymdb for symbol lookups, prevents gosymdb output piping

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Custom status line — dir, git branch/dirty state, model, context %, usage rates (robbyrussell-style)

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Structured implementation plan creation with context gathering, approach exploration, and revdiff review

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: Collaborative design dialogue — turn ideas into designs through incremental questions and approach exploration

plugins.name: style
plugins.description: Writing style guides for technical communication — PR descriptions, issue comments, commit messages

plugins.name: global-rules
plugins.description: Shared global CLAUDE.md rules — plan-first workflow, commit hygiene, Go tooling, CLI best practices

plugins.name: git-tools
plugins.description: Git workflow skills — squash-rebase onto main after a squash-merged parent branch
